product.title: P1-Kennedy 6 Piece Square Modular Sectional Sofa with Ottoman
product.keywords: home decor,decor,family room furniture,home furnishings,sofas,living room furniture,furniture,couch,seating,living room seating,modern sofas,velvet sofa,sectional footstool,sectional pouffe,large sectional sofa
product.description: Our Kennedy modular sectional sofa includes three corner chairs, two armless chairs and an ottoman to bring chic modern style and comfort to your space. Made with solid pine frames upholstered in an elegant yet durable linen-like fabric in gray, navy or a light neutral hue, each piece is finished with natural wood cone-shaped legs. This six-piece set comes in an expansive ready-made configuration so you don't have to deal with design dilemmas.

product.title: P1-Oat Left Facing Angled 2 Piece Fletcher Sectional Sofa
product.keywords: sofas,living room furniture,furniture,couch,seating,living room seating,home decor,decor,loveseat,futon,sectional,sectional couch,l shaped couch,l shaped sofa
product.description: Tuck into this perfectly plush left-facing sectional sofa for an irresistibly comfy experience. Comprised of a classic love seat and a deep angled chaise that begs to be curled up in, it's crafted from sturdy solid wood, covered in easy-to-clean, neutral oat-hued fabric and outfitted with splayed walnut-finished legs for a dash of chic style.
